title: SKV Law Offices announces Annual Promotions
description: SKV Law Offices has announced its Annual Promotions, with multiple elevations across positions.As part of this year’s promotions, Priya Dhankar has been elevated to the position of Associate Partner. Akash Lamba and Mohit Mansharamani have been promoted to the role of Counsel.Priya Dhankar, Akash Lamba, Mohit MansharamaniThe firm has also announced the promotion of Ashirwad Sapre, Tanishka Khatana, Nikunj Bhatnagar, Punyam Bhutani, Vedant Choudhary, and Kunal Veer Chopra to the position of Senio
